title: alaternus × hybridus
intro: Alaternus × hybridus, also known as the Italian buckthorn or glossy buckthorn, is a hybrid plant species derived from the cross between Rhamnus alaternus and Rhamnus cathartica. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The extracts from Alaternus × hybridus have been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting against bacteria and fungi, and promoting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
